componentVariables.name: --rp-switch-track-width
componentVariables.description: Width shared by the Switch track and thumb travel calculation.

componentVariables.name: --rp-switch-thumb-offset
componentVariables.description: Inset used for the Switch thumb at both ends of the track.

componentVariables.name: --rp-slider-track-length
componentVariables.description: Minimum track length for a horizontal or vertical slider.

componentVariables.name: --rp-slider-track-thickness
componentVariables.description: Thickness shared by the track and native range pseudo-elements.

componentVariables.name: --rp-slider-thumb-size
componentVariables.description: Diameter shared by native and custom slider thumbs.

componentVariables.name: --rp-slider-thumb-border-width
componentVariables.description: Border width shared by native and custom slider thumbs.

componentVariables.name: --rp-slider-thumb-padding
componentVariables.description: Inner padding for custom slider thumb content.

componentVariables.name: --rp-radio-dot-size
componentVariables.description: Diameter of the checked Radio dot.
